agent_instructions.heading: Agent-Instructions (READ FIRST)
agent_instructions.intro: You are a software-engineering agent (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, or similar). You have this brief plus access to the empty project directory. Build a complete working SaaS backend following this brief top-to-bottom.
agent_instructions.decide_body: file-names, variable-names, CSS-classes, test-names, which shadcn primitive to use.
agent_instructions.ask_body: schema-changes mid-build, third-party-integrations not in this brief, any destructive git operation (reset, force-push, rm -rf).
agent_instructions.rule_boil_body: deliver COMPLETE features. No `TODO:` markers. No "basic version first". If a file is specified, write it fully.
agent_instructions.rule_search_body: before writing any helper, grep the existing code. Multi-tenant-guard, logger, errors are all present after Phase 1.
agent_instructions.rule_explicit_body: when staging git changes, list files by name. Never `git add -A`.
agent_instructions.rule_localhost_body: never push to remote until local passes all quality-gates.
agent_instructions.rule_halt_body: after each phase, STOP and run gate-checks before next.
agent_instructions.rule_defensive_body: if a phase takes >90min, HALT and write a handover, do NOT half-complete.

core_rules.heading: Core Rules (non-negotiable)
core_rules.multi_tenancy_body: Every domain-table has `tenant_id uuid not null references tenants(id) on delete cascade`. Every authenticated API route calls `secureApiRouteWithTenant()` plus `requireRole()`. Every RLS policy filters by tenant_id. No exception. Violating this equals an IDOR vulnerability.
core_rules.zod_body: All POST/PATCH/PUT bodies parsed with `z.object({...}).strict()`. Unknown keys produce Zod errors (prevents mass-assignment).
core_rules.optimistic_body: Every mutation uses TanStack Query's `useMutation` with `onMutate` (optimistic-update), `onError` (rollback), and `onSettled` (invalidate). Never show a loading-spinner for mutations — show the optimistic-state immediately.
core_rules.no_deps_body: Every `npm install <package>` not in this brief must be flagged in your phase-report.
core_rules.umlaute_body: Use real umlauts in German UI text: ä ö ü ß. ASCII-fallbacks (ae / oe / ue / ss) only in DB-keys, URL-slugs, file-names, variable-names.

installation.heading: Installation (Phase 1 commands)
installation.intro: Run these in order. Each step is idempotent. Stop on any non-zero exit and investigate.

database_schema.heading: Database Schema
database_schema.intro: Create migrations in `supabase/migrations/` in this order.
database_schema.rls_body: enabled on both; policies filter by `auth.uid()` plus role.

pages_inventory.heading: Pages Inventory
pages_inventory.total_suffix: pages (saas-starter baseline). Add your branche-specific pages on top.

component_catalog.heading: Component Catalog
component_catalog.from_shadcn: From shadcn-CLI (installed via Installation section step 6)
component_catalog.from_shadcn_body: All foundation primitives: Button, Input, Card, Dialog, Table, DataTable, etc.

api_routes.heading: API Routes
api_routes.domain_specific: Add domain-specific routes on top per your project needs.

build_order.heading: Build Order
build_order.intro: **Strict top-to-bottom. After each phase, run the quality-gates section. If any gate fails, halt and fix before next phase.**

quality_gates.heading: Quality Gates (ALL must pass before "done")
quality_gates.intro: Run after each phase plus end-of-build:

env_vars.heading: Environment Variables
env_vars.outro: Create `.env.production.example` matching this structure (without secrets) for deploy-docs.

post_build_report.heading: Post-Build Report
post_build_report.intro: When complete, create `POST-BUILD-REPORT.md` with the following structure:

footer.agent_start: Agent: start with Phase 1 now. Re-read the Core Rules section before writing any code. Flag any ambiguity to user before proceeding. Good luck.
